items.title: Southern Arc — Captain's Brief
items.summary: Open conversation thread between Captain Ren Solare and any walker who has met her. Five exchanges, public-visible. Continues from her morning audience.

items.title: Brackish's Plaza Log
items.summary: Running record of what the urchin sees in the great plaza. Updates daily. Currently three days of recent observations.

items.title: The Smuggling Chain
items.summary: Pia Thalis and Lyra Thorne's monthly satchel coordination. Visible only to participants in the chain (which now includes you).

items.title: Ono Kell ↔ Oracle Nesha
items.summary: Half-finished cross-world correspondence about drift signatures. Eight letters carried so far, by various hands.

items.title: Kael Torchlight's Welcome
items.summary: Kael's standing invitation to any walker who has completed the cook-eat-fight-commune cycle. Drinks in his vault at any hour.
